message:
chore: establish design system with fluid typography, spacing, and animation tokens

Add comprehensive CSS custom properties to globals.css creating a cohesive
design system foundation:

Typography Scale (fluid, using clamp()):
- --type-hero: 40px → 96px for main headlines
- --type-h1 through --type-caption with smooth viewport scaling
- Line height tokens (--leading-*) from 1.0 to 1.75
- Letter spacing tokens (--tracking-*) from -0.04em to 0.1em

Spacing Scale (8px base rhythm):
- --space-0 through --space-32 (0 to 128px)
- --section-py/px for consistent section padding
- All values in rem for accessibility

Elevation/Shadow Scale:
- --shadow-xs through --shadow-2xl for depth hierarchy
- --glow-sm/md/lg for dark theme accent effects

Animation Tokens:
- Easing functions: ease-out, ease-in-out, spring, bounce, smooth
- Duration tokens from instant (0.1s) to slower (0.6s)

This foundation enables consistent, responsive design across all components
while maintaining Stripe-level polish and accessibility best practices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
